src/pages/arena/ArenaPage.tsx\u0000c4a06.title: Click handler missing keyboard handler
src/pages/arena/ArenaPage.tsx\u0000c4a06.message: Keyboard users can't trigger this click handler because there's no keyboard one, so add `onKeyUp`, `onKeyDown`, or `onKeyPress`.
src/pages/arena/ArenaPage.tsx\u0000c4a06.help: Pair `onClick` with a key handler so keyboard users can trigger it.

src/pages/arena/ArenaPage.tsx\u0000c4a06.title: Interaction on static element
src/pages/arena/ArenaPage.tsx\u0000c4a06.message: Screen reader users can't tell this click handler is interactive because it has no `role`, so add a `role` or use a button or link.
src/pages/arena/ArenaPage.tsx\u0000c4a06.help: Give clickable static elements a `role`, or use a button or link.

src/pages/arena/ArenaPage.tsx\u0000c4a06.title: Array index used as a key
src/pages/arena/ArenaPage.tsx\u0000c4a06.message: Your users can see & submit the wrong data when this list reorders or filters, so use a stable id like `key={item.id}`, not the array index "idx".
src/pages/arena/ArenaPage.tsx\u0000c4a06.help: Use a stable id from the item, like `key={item.id}` or `key={item.slug}`. Index keys break when the list reorders or filters.
